scope.target: Validate and close the repository pattern standards alignment workflow
scope.dependency_radius: All files changed by the workflow
constraints: All implementation tasks must be completed or explicitly deferred
Do not claim closure with unresolved contradictory active guidance
Record skipped validation and residual risk
non_goals: No new architecture decisions during final validation

inputs.architecture_target: A validated, internally consistent repository pattern rule family

steps: Record residual risks and deferred work
validation: Repository rule searches match approved decisions
Changed scripts pass syntax and focused behavior checks
